design_philosophy.target_audience: European news readers who value quality over noise.

NewsCard.description: Full-screen vertical card. Immersive image background or split layout.

styles.container: flex-1 w-full h-full bg-background relative overflow-hidden
styles.overlay: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-1/2 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 to-transparent p-6 flex justify-end
styles.title: text-white font-serif text-3xl font-bold mb-3 shadow-sm
styles.summary: text-white/90 font-sans text-base leading-relaxed line-clamp-3 mb-4
styles.meta: flex-row items-center gap-2 text-white/70 text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider

styles.container: flex-row px-4 py-3 gap-3 bg-background/95 backdrop-blur border-b border-border
styles.pill: px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-border bg-surface

styles.container: flex-row justify-around items-center h-16 bg-surface border-t border-border pb-safe

placeholders.description: City skyline, suitable for business or tech news.
Coffee cup on ledge, suitable for lifestyle or morning briefs.
People near window, suitable for social or political news.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The user has requested to follow '.js' file guidelines, but the codebase is in TypeScript (.tsx). Use TypeScript interfaces where possible but prioritize the logic and structure defined here.
Implement the vertical swipe using a PagerView (react-native-pager-view) or a vertical FlatList with 'pagingEnabled' for the best performance.
Ensure the 'Home' screen is immersive. Hide the standard header when reading a card if possible, or make it transparent.
Typography: Use a Serif font for Headlines to achieve the Flipboard look. If external fonts (Playfair Display) aren't loaded, fallback to the system Serif.
Color Palette: Strictly adhere to the 'light' and 'dark' themes defined. Use the 'Auto' detection to switch.
For the 'NewsCard', ensure the image takes up at least 50% of the screen or is a full background with a gradient overlay for text readability.
Add a 'Bookmark' and 'Share' icon on every card, easily accessible with a thumb tap (bottom right or bottom bar).
Micro-interactions: Add a subtle scale-down effect on the card when swiping begins.
For accessibility, ensure all text over images has sufficient contrast (use the defined gradient overlay).
Use 'lucide-react-native' for icons if available, or Expo's default vector icons.
All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' for testing.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds unless specified (use solid paper/dark colors).
Avoid centering text in news articles; left-align for readability.
Use 2-3x more padding than standard lists.
Use 'sonner' for toasts if available, otherwise standard Alerts.
Follow the 'Bento' grid only for the 'Explore' or 'Search' tab, not the main feed.
